overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk through a rainy urban park. The player descends concrete stairs and walks along wet paved paths surrounded by palm trees, with illuminated downtown skyscrapers visible in the background and a small facility building on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase leading to urban plaza

events.description: descending the wet concrete stairs into the plaza area
reaching the bottom of the stairs onto flat pavement

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down rain-slicked concrete stairs into the plaza, with metal handrails on both sides

entered.detail: wet concrete staircase with visible rain droplets and puddles
silver metal handrail running alongside the left side of the stairs
silver metal handrail running alongside the right side of the stairs
tall palm tree trunks visible beyond the stairs on the left
tall palm tree trunks visible beyond the stairs on the right
small white concrete building with blue roof and illuminated windows
tall illuminated glass office towers visible through the rain in the distance
dark green bushes lining the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the top of a concrete staircase in a rainy urban park at night. The player descends the wet stairs, passing metal handrails and landscaped hedges, with palm trees framing the view ahead. A small white facility building sits to the right while downtown skyscrapers loom in the background against the dark rainy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open palm tree plaza with wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked plaza surrounded by palm trees, moving past the facility building

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open plaza on flat wet pavement, surrounded by palm trees in the heavy rain. The player passes the small white facility building on the right, which eventually falls behind as the path continues. The downtown skyline remains visible through the trees while the stair railings disappear from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from a raised park entrance into a rain-slicked urban plaza beneath a dark skyline. It begins at the top of a concrete staircase, moving downward past metal handrails and manicured hedges while palm trees frame the view of distant skyscrapers. As the camera reaches the bottom, the terrain shifts from the stairs to a flat, wet pavement, passing a small white facility building on the right. The scene then opens into a wider plaza where the building falls behind and the railings disappear from view. Finally, the movement continues through the heavy rain, with the illuminated downtown skyline remaining visible through the surrounding palm trees.
